title: Catholics’ fury as Italian TV ad depicts nuns eating crisps for communion
snippet: Viewers' association accuses Amica Chips of resorting to blasphemy in order to increase sales.
reason: The title and snippet mention 'crisps' (a term commonly used for potato chips in some regions) and the context involves a controversy related to food products, making it directly relevant to a potato chip/crisps news website.
